title: benthamia glaberrima
intro: Benthamia glaberrima, also known as the Indian earthworm plant, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Benthamia glaberrima include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
